referenceObject.reference: Pertegal, C. & Molero-Baltanás, R. (2022). Description of a new trapdoor spider species, Nemesia amicitia spec. nov., from southern Spain, and new information on Nemesia uncinata (Araneae: Mygalomorphae: Nemesiidae). Arachnologische Mitteilungen 64: 1-13. doi: 10.30963/aramit6401
